nodes.label: F9 SCFF:GD trade curve — digits (no free lunch)
nodes.rationale: Held-out accuracy declines monotonically 0.965->0.920 as SCFF fraction k/L rises 0->1 (pure-GD ceiling dashed at 0.965, n=5). Relative GD backward cost (right axis, gray dotted) drops fastest in the first 25% step then plateaus 25-75% before dropping again at 100% — confirms 'the only real saving is the input layer', no free-lunch SCFF:GD ratio.
